question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: getArchiveDestinationFolderPath()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a stream file whose filename is fewer than 10 characters so that `streamFileData.getFilename().substring(0, 10)` throws a `StringIndexOutOfBoundsException`, crashing the importer process and halting all new transaction confirmation?
